Bramayugam

ഭ്രമയുഗം

"The Age of Madness"

7.6
2024MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

A folk singer in 17th-century Kerala discovers a mansion. Inside, he encounters an enigmatic cook and a powerful master, setting in motion a chain of events that changes his life.

Tags

black magicsorcererblack and whitewitchcraftdark fantasyold mansionfolk horrorfolktalehaunted mansionsupernatural horrorexperimentalarthouse horrorarthousefantasy folk
